CustomField.description: The AV Reduction End Date sets the end of the asset value reduction schedule. Initially aligned with the lease end date, it reflects the end date of the last reduction schedule. Users can adjust this date to extend the schedule, beyond the lease period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The AV Reduction End Date defaults to the lease End date for the initial setup. Later, it reflects the End date of the last reduction schedule. User can update the End date to regenerate the schedule, applying changes upto the specified period. The end date of the reduction schedule can be extended beyond the lease period.
CustomField.label: AV Reduction End Date
